stories.title: AAP Says Keep Your Kids' Vaccines Current — Even If CDC Doesn't Agree

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The AAP kept its 18-disease vaccine schedule for kids in 2026 — the CDC reduced its list to 11.

Most pediatricians follow the AAP. Ask your doctor which they use at your next checkup. [URL]

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
AAP vs. CDC vaccine schedules diverged in 2026.

AAP keeps: Hep A, Hep B, rotavirus, meningococcal, RSV, flu for all kids.
HPV: AAP says ages 9-12. CDC: 11-12.

Your pediatrician likely follows AAP. [URL]

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: AAP vs. CDC Vaccine Schedules 2026: What Colorado Springs Families Need to Know

AAP vs CDC Vaccine Schedule

#### Image 1A — X Post (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A warm, reassuring medical scene: a pediatrician's exam table in a bright, modern clinic room with sunlight coming through a window. On the table, a small clipboard with a simple checklist and a pen beside it. A child's colorful sneaker visible at the edge of the table. Soft teal and white color palette with warm natural light. Clean, hopeful mood. Art style: photo-realistic with soft depth of field. Bottom third is clean white-to-light-teal gradient with minimal visual content for text overlay.

**Alt text:** A bright pediatric exam room with a clipboard checklist and a child's sneaker visible at the edge of the table.

---

#### Image 1B — Facebook (1200x630)

**Prompt:**
A close-up, warmly lit scene of a parent and young child at a pediatrician's office. The child (approximately 5 years old, gender-neutral appearance) sits on an exam table in a paper gown, looking curious, not scared. A friendly pediatrician in a white coat is visible in soft focus in the background. Soft teal and cream color palette with warm clinic lighting. Mood: calm, reassuring, modern healthcare. Art style: photo-realistic with gentle warmth. Bottom third is mostly neutral background for text overlay.

**Alt text:** A young child sitting on a pediatrician's exam table looking curious, with a doctor in soft focus in the background.

stories.title: Recall Alert: Joyin Sloosh Dive Sticks Pose Impalement Hazard — Stop Using Now

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
RECALL: Joyin Sloosh dive sticks — stop using them now.

They violate the federal dive stick ban. Risk of piercing injuries in shallow water.

Check your pool bag. Contact Joyin for a refund. [URL]

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Joyin Sloosh Dive Sticks Recalled: Impalement Risk, Violates Federal Pool Toy Ban

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:

#### Image 2A — X Post (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A bright summer pool scene: a family pool bag sitting on a concrete pool deck in midday sun, items partially visible (sunscreen, towel, water bottle), with a blurred pool in the background showing sparkling blue water. A bold red warning-style graphic space in the upper left is empty (text overlay goes there). Color palette: vibrant summer blues, coral, and white. Mood: urgent but summery — not scary, just alert. Art style: photo-realistic, bright natural light. Bottom third: clean deck surface for text overlay.

**Alt text:** A pool bag on a sunny concrete deck with a blurred sparkling blue pool in the background.

---

#### Image 2B — Facebook (1200x630)

**Prompt:**
A close-up of a family pool bag on a sunny outdoor deck, contents spilling slightly — sunscreen tube, bright towel corner, a water bottle. The bag is a bright primary-colored nylon tote. Background: out-of-focus lush backyard and pool edge. Mood: bright summer day with a cautionary undertone. Color palette: sunny yellows, blues, coral. Art style: photo-realistic, warm afternoon light. Bottom third: clean deck surface with minimal objects for text overlay.

**Alt text:** A colorful pool bag on a sunny deck with summer essentials partially visible.

stories.title: Summer Trail Upgrades Arriving in COS: Blodgett Open Space + Fox Run

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Blodgett Open Space adds 14 miles of trails this summer — with mountain bike-only routes and a new trailhead.

Fox Run's pond and gazebo renovation also wraps up. [URL]

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: COS Summer Trail Upgrades 2026: Blodgett Open Space and Fox Run Regional Park

COS Summer Trail Upgrades

#### Image 3A — X Post (1200x675)

**Prompt:**
A wide-angle view of a Rocky Mountain foothills trail on a clear summer morning. The path winds through dry scrub oak and pine, with red rock formations visible in the mid-distance. A family of four (two adults, two children of elementary school age) walks the trail away from camera in casual hiking clothes. Mood: adventurous, family-friendly, Colorado summer. Color palette: dusty terra cotta, pine green, clear blue sky. Art style: photo-realistic, golden morning light. Bottom third: trail surface and dry grass with open sky for text overlay.

**Alt text:** A family of four hiking a winding Rocky Mountain foothill trail with red rock formations in the distance.

---

#### Image 3B — Facebook (1200x630)

**Prompt:**
A mountain bike trail winding through Colorado foothills terrain — scrub oak, rock outcroppings, clear blue sky. A single mountain biker (adult, helmet, no brand logos) rides ahead on the trail, mid-distance, small in frame to emphasize the landscape. Morning light casting long shadows. Mood: active, expansive, Colorado outdoors. Color palette: pine green, rust red, sky blue. Art style: photo-realistic, crisp morning light. Bottom third: rocky trail foreground with open composition for text overlay.

**Alt text:** A mountain biker on a winding Colorado foothills trail with scrub oak and rock outcroppings.

---

stories.title: Bear Creek Nature Center Pollinator Celebration — June 26, $5/Person

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Bear Creek Nature Center hosts a Pollinator Celebration on June 26.

Bug sweeps, hands-on activities, native pollinator education. $5/person.

Great science activity for kids this summer. [URL]

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

**Prompt:**
A close-up macro scene of a native bee landing on a wildflower cluster in a Colorado meadow — purple coneflower or native sunflower. The bee is in sharp focus with soft bokeh green and yellow meadow background. Mood: wonder, discovery, educational. Color palette: warm gold, purple, soft green. Art style: photo-realistic macro photography style, warm natural afternoon light. Bottom third: soft blurred meadow grass in muted green for text overlay.

**Alt text:** A native bee landing on a purple wildflower in close-up macro view with a soft green meadow background.

#### Image 4B — Facebook (1200x630)

**Prompt:**
A child (approximately 7-8 years old, gender-neutral) holding an insect net and peering into it with wide-eyed curiosity, standing in a sun-dappled meadow. Wildflowers and tall grass in the background, soft natural light. The child's expression is delighted and focused. Mood: wonder, hands-on outdoor learning, joyful. Color palette: warm greens, gold, sky blue. Art style: photo-realistic, gentle summer lighting. Bottom third: meadow grass transitioning to softer tones for text overlay.

stories.title: Recall: Bellabu Bear Children's Robes — Burn Hazard, Violates Sleepwear Standard

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Recall: Bellabu Bear children's robes are recalled for a burn hazard. They violate mandatory flammability standards for kids' sleepwear.

Stop using and contact Bellabu Bear for a remedy. [URL]

#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

article.headline: Bellabu Bear Children's Robes Recalled for Burn Hazard: What Parents Need to Know
